title: fragaria vesca subsp. sylvestris
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. sylvestris, commonly known as wild strawberries or Alpine strawberries, is a subspecies of the fragaria vesca species, which is a type of strawberry plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of fragaria vesca subsp. sylvestris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
